reviews.review_description: I have been playing eclipsed terror for quite a while now, it's a good game, I love it. I took a bit of a break from it because of school but when I returned and I pressed the button to join a public server, I was in it for half a second and then got kicked from the server. This kept happening so I had unistalled it and installed it again but it keeps happening. What is wrong?

So i got banned because apparently I said the n-word which i didn't. I just joined a lobby and I went to the lower floor and some moderator i don't know who but they accused me of saying the n-word and im trying to defend myself by saying i didn't say it i didn't say and I just joined (I did) and someone was else came in and had there back and they said they would ban me for 400 hours but I was trying to stay calm because I didn't want to get mad and try to explain myself but they wouldn't listen. In the end I think they just trying accuse me of something I didn't do but then again there are many other people saying horrible stuff and the innocent people always have to take the blame for something they didn't do.

I wasn't planning on making this a paragraph but im just gonna find something similar to eclipsed terror I have no clue what i will do after this thank you for reading KoKo out😕

reviews.review_title: the devs should do an unban update.
reviews.review_description: I think the devs should do an unban update because i know some people in eclipsed terror was falsely banned and i was banned for no reason i was in spawn and then some kid started saying the n-word, and then some mod thought I was saying because I was next to him so I got banned for not doing anything and the worst part is i cant get an unban appeal because i don't have an id which makes it worst. Eclipsed terror devs if your seeing this. Pls fix this problem and please. I want to get unbanned

Hi. If your reading this note (including devs) I am sorry for being so rude to eclipsed terror that I was begging for the red name tag that a lot of people have im not talking about content creator badge. So I am very sorry about what I said on the review to eclipsed terror. Im still banned on eclipsed terror discord but im still gonna play the game. So if I get banned. Its over. So ty for reading this apology review of what I said to eclipsed terror. Please don't ban me

reviews.review_title: Just do yourself a favor and get da game
reviews.review_description: This game is genuinely amazing bro, as of now, the game will receive its final update, for V1. Many new monsters, summoning, maps and map revamps, a whole lightsaber mode revamp??? Game pings almost everyday, to play and get to know the moderators and owners. There will be a V2 with an unknown release, but it's amazing to know that there are finally owners who really care about their game, you can even leave YOUR suggestions in the discord to be added into the game. Joining the discord makes this game much more enjoyable and engaging. Please support this game (boost the discord as I plan to do soon).

reviews.review_description: This game seems really fun to play around with all the monsters!

Games fun with consistent updates. Though as of writing this, there are benches in the main floor of the main game mode when you go outside that make it tedious to run from monsters without getting stuck

Also it’s very easy to die, as a lot of monsters are as fast if not way faster than you (without a bundle), so turning will be the single hardest task you can accomplish but the game is still super fun regardless

Eclipsed terror is in my top 3 vr horror games ever, and that is because they have regular updates, fast monsters, and the best of all, the game modes. the game modes are REALLY fun since not only does the dev team also update the game modes, but they make them unique. the game modes are super fun because of the monsters. they specifically pick monsters that would fit the game modes well. You should download eclipsed terror because the moderation is great and countless updates make the game better and better every single time.

reviews.review_title: One of the best horror games ever
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend play this for hours every day. This game genuinely gets me excited by the thought of it. There is a lot to do and it's really fun to play with your friends. I love the game but I think they should bring back some stuff from legacy monster ambience, rooms, enraging and other. I never go a day without playing this and it's my #1 go to. The devs always leak updates on the discord and they always keep everyone excited. Genuinely a great game and definitely a must play. I hope the devs read this and r happy 👍

reviews.review_title: This game is so scary and so unqiue!
reviews.review_description: This game has many monsters and not only are the monsters actually super fast but the player has an insane speed boost, so most the the monsters are actually outrunnable. The amount of monsters it has is crazy, and most are spawn only cuz theyre too fast to be in the main map normally! And, there is also currently 4-5 floors, and a cave and outside section. There are also cosmetics that are affordable. This game is genuinely the best gtag horror game I have played. Ever.￼

I got this game back when it barely had 20 CCU, and my first playthrough was unreal. It genuinely scared me, kept me on edge, and made me want to keep playing nonstop. I would 100% spend money on this game without hesitation.

I really hope future updates don’t change it too much, because I’ve seen that happen before—Animal Company was once a unique gorilla-style game, but updates completely changed it and ruined what made it special.

This game has some of the most fun game modes and monsters I’ve ever played against. It’s a truly unforgettable experience that more people need to try. I hope this game’s CCU can increase, because it’s so popular that it’s often full and hard to get into a match.
